name: No Mess Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Brown the ground beef and drain excess fat.
3. Mix together the browned ground beef and spaghetti sauce (add spices).
4. In a medium bowl, mix cottage cheese, mozzarella cheese, and egg until well blended.
5. Spread one-quarter of the sauce on the bottom of a 9 x 13 x 2 inch pan (approximately).
6. Place three lasagna noodles across the bottom of the pan.
7. Place half of the cottage cheese mixture on top of the noodles, then layer one-third of the sauce and another layer of noodles.
8. Repeat steps 7-8 two more times, ending with a top layer of noodles, then top with remaining sauce.
9. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Cover tightly with foil.
11. Bake for 1 hour covered.
12. Remove foil and bake an additional 15 minutes.
13. Use a knife to test the tenderness of the noodles; they should be soft.
14. Let cool for 10 minutes before cutting into serving pieces.
Microwave Version:
Use an 8 x 8 glass dish. Follow the above steps, except cover loosely with wax paper.
1. Microwave on high for 18 minutes.
2. Turn the dish and continue microwaving another 18 minutes.
3. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
4. Test for doneness; if necessary, zap longer.
